title: lootSHULKERbox
description: Changes some of the Shulker Boxes to look like Loot Boxes from Overwatch.
body:
Overwatch lovers can now bring a little bit of the game into Minecraft!

![showcase of the textures](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/39c5bd955ba7863e8af513f631888eaaccd401f6.png)

For each box, a GUI is applied, to bring more of the visuals to the game. If you use together with [Colourful containers](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/colourful-containers-dark-mode-gui), it will look better.

![Custom GUI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9941055daeeceb9462c091988fa9d146593149ad.png)

And if you want, try to use a name tag with "Jeff" on a Shulker 👀

For now, this resource pack will overwrite some of the shulker box textures. In the future, I want to bring a version where you can activate the textures by name.

But since I haven't been able to make it work yet, I'll leave it for the future. If you know how to do this, please contact me through discord (seiyadipessego).

Enjoy! If you have any problem with it, pls contact me.
